structure.title: SUMMARY
structure.summary: The partial document outlines the professional profile of Parakh Jaipurkar, a Product Manager with over 4 years of experience in data-driven product development, compliance automation, and B2B SaaS. It highlights expertise in translating business goals into actionable product strategies through collaboration with engineering, data science, and compliance teams. Key skills include product management, data analytics (SQL, KPI tracking, A/B analysis), agile delivery, risk and compliance workflows, and fintech knowledge. The document also emphasizes proficiency in tools like Jira, Confluence, Figma, and Tableau, along with exposure to quantitative finance concepts such as portfolio optimization and risk modeling. The experience section details achievements at Masters India, including leading product lifecycles, optimizing compliance platforms, enhancing fraud detection workflows, and driving a 40% increase in platform adoption through GTM strategies and stakeholder communication.

It highlights expertise in translating business goals into data-backed strategies through collaboration with engineering, data science, and compliance teams. Key skills include product management, data analytics, agile delivery, risk and compliance, and fintech, with proficiency in tools like SQL, Jira, Confluence, and Tableau. nodes.title: THINK & LEARN PVT. LTD. (BYJU’S) BENGALURU, INDIA Associate Product Content Mar 2022 to Jan 2023
nodes.summary: The partial document outlines professional experience, education, and certifications. It highlights roles at BYJU'S as an Associate Product Content professional, focusing on designing interactive learning content, collaborating on product prototypes, and analyzing user retention metrics. At Pokarna Engineered Stone Ltd., the individual worked as an Assistant Product Manager Trainee, conducting data analytics, optimizing production processes, and implementing cost-saving measures. The education section mentions a BE in Chemical Engineering from BITS, Goa. Certifications include a Certificate in Quantitative Finance (CQF) Level-1 and a Product Management Fellowship from Upraised.
